logo.description: A minimalist logo featuring stylized yellow horizontal bars resembling honey drips against an orange background, with subtle pink shadows. It visually evokes honey, warmth, and connection

instagram.visual_description: Dark gray background featuring a smartphone displaying a map with yellow location pins. Above, bold text reads 'Welcome to Hiver' with 'Hiver' in gradient yellow-pink letters. Small bee and hexagon graphics accent the design.
instagram.brand_message: Promotes Hiver as a social app focused on restoring genuine human connection through in-person meetups.

instagram.visual_description: Dark gray background with bold gradient text 'WHY HIVER' in yellow and pink. Below, a vertical list of phrases highlights modern social disconnection — 'DOOMSCROLLING TOOK OVER', 'FRIENDSHIPS FELL APART', 'SOCIAL LIFE DISAPPEARED', 'REAL LIFE GOT REPLACED', 'WEEKENDS BECAME BORING'. The post ends with 'BUT NOT ANYMORE....' accompanied by a small Hiver logo and honeycomb accents.
instagram.brand_message: Highlights the social isolation caused by digital habits and positions Hiver as the solution that revives authentic, real-world human connection.

instagram.visual_description: Dark gray layout with 'WHAT IS HIVER' in large gradient letters and honey drip graphics at the top. Six icons with labels and descriptions explain app features: Explore Map, Join Hives, Create Hives, The Buzz, Hive Calendars, and Always Connected. Honeycomb accents decorate the corners, reinforcing a cohesive bee and community theme.
instagram.brand_message: Explains Hiver’s functionality and mission to build local communities through shared experiences, making it easy for people to connect, create, and sustain genuine relationships offline.

instagram.visual_description: Create a post for engaging content that showcases authentic in person connection. I envision a post showing a group of people laughing and smiling together in a group at a common gathering place (restaurant, patio, fire, etc.).
A post that shows genuine human connection and happiness through real-life interaction, rather than doomscrolling.
A post that shows genuine human connection and happiness through real-life interaction, rather than doomscrolling.
A brand awareness post with a call to action to download hiver
Generate a post for brand awareness with a call to action for downloading hiver
Generate a post with people laughing in community vs sad doomscrolling, with a call to action to download hiver

Create a modern, eye-catching Instagram post for a social app called Hiver that promotes real-life human connection. The visual should feel rebellious, authentic, and hopeful, opposing digital isolation and doomscrolling.

Scene direction: Show real people laughing or talking face-to-face in a warm, urban or natural setting — coffee shop, rooftop, park, or street corner. Focus on genuine human emotion and togetherness, not posed selfies.

Visual style: Minimal and modern composition with strong contrast, natural lighting, and warm, lively tones. Use negative space effectively. Avoid screens or phones.

Design elements: Include subtle bee or hive-inspired shapes (hexagons, golden hues) as abstract motifs or overlays. The Hiver logo (if provided) should appear clean and minimal in a corner.

Typography overlay (optional):
“Bringing back genuine human connection.”
Subtext: “Meet. Talk. Laugh. Live.”
CTA: “Download Hiver and start meeting in the real world.”

Mood: Joyful, real, communal, liberating — a celebration of being together.

Exclude: phones, screens, excessive filters, digital or sci-fi aesthetics.
Change the logo and remove the honey beehive honey combs on the top left of the image. Center the text and Highlight hiver in the Call to action at the bottom
Center the logo and enlarge it. The Logo must match the surrounding aesthetics.

Fix up the call to action that says "Download Hiver today and reconnect with real-life adventures!" to "Bringing back genuine Human Connection," with "Human Connection" highlighted. Insert the hiver logo under the heading "Hiver"
Generate a brand awareness post with a call to action showing genuine human connection of people laughing in community

target_audience.demographics: 16-35 years old, interested in social connection, community, and real-life experiences
pain_points: Not able to connect with people in real life
Not able to find people to hang out with
Not able to find people to do activities with

key_messages: Hiver is a social app built to undo digital disconnection.
We’re bringing people back together — face to face, not feed to feed.
Every hive is a space for real conversations, laughter, and shared moments.
Hiver isn’t about followers; it’s about friends.
The digital world divided us — Hiver helps us find each other again.
messaging.call_to_action: Download Hiver and start meeting in the real world.
